title: Plutarch, Moralia: That a Philosopher Ought to Converse Especially with Men in Power
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: That a Philosopher Ought to Converse Especially with Men in Power.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: That a Philosopher Ought to Converse Especially with Men in Power.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'That a Philosopher Ought to Converse Especially with Men in Power': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
